title: Star Health Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Star Health Insurance is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!
